## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategy for Swoogo's field marketing service pages and content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improved: impressions up from 4k to 12k in past month](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Plan to create 2 additional field marketing pages to target specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Content refresh quota shifted to new topics (10 articles/week) due to completion of existing refresh needs](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant improvement in SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
      - [Impressions increased from 4,000 to 12,000 in the past month](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [First-page rankings achieved for various field marketing-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

### Field Marketing Keyword Strategy

  - [Identified 9 keywords for blog content (e.g., "what is field marketing", "field marketing strategies")](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [3 keywords targeted for service pages:](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
    1.  Field marketing software
    2.  Field marketing software for events
    3.  Field marketing solution
  - [Plan to optimize existing field marketing page for "field marketing software"](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Create 2 new pages for remaining keywords, mirroring current design](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Page Creation Strategy

  - [New pages won't be in main navigation](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Will use similar design to existing field marketing page](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Aimed at improving search rankings and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Minimal design changes required, mainly content updates](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Pages discoverable via Google search, not site navigation](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Content Refresh Update

  - [Completed content refresh for \~130 articles (30 new + 100 existing)](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Shifting focus from content refresh (5/week) to new topics (10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Implementation Considerations

  - [Minimal design work needed](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Some development work may be required](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Timeline to be determined after discussion with Will (out until Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/x9qvcy7cy7LiRmn37xcsPcKhKgicsxJA?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
